'''Game Talents''' is a Chinese team. They have close ties to the [[Masters 3]] organization.
== History ==
'''Game Talents''' was announced on May 18, 2016, having acquired [[Energy Pacemaker.All]]'s [[LPL/2016 Season/Summer Season|LPL Summer Season]] seed.
